message:
fix(bundler): fix bundle install signature verification flow

The previous implementation made all bundle installations impossible by
default because:
1. Unsigned bundles failed with "bundle is unsigned" error
2. Signed bundles failed with "no signature verifier configured" error

This fix improves the flow to be more pragmatic:
- --no-verify: Skip all verification (unchanged)
- Default (unsigned): Allow with warning for development use
- Default (signed): Fail with helpful error explaining trusted keys
  aren't yet configurable, suggesting --no-verify workaround

This establishes the signature verification pattern while remaining
usable until full trusted key configuration is implemented.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
